DESCRIPTION This instrument can be struck once every 10 minutes, and its resonant tone lasts for 3 full minutes. While the chime is resonating, no spell requiring a verbal component can be cast within a 30-foot radius of it unless the caster can make a concentration check ( DC 15 + the spell’s level). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, shout; Cost 8,400 gp
